summary: Characters with the skill may operate in zero-G

mechanics.name_guess: Characters with the skill may operate in zero-G
mechanics.breadcrumb_path: Rules Compendium > Page 121 > quests > Characters with the skill may operate in zero-G
mechanics.excerpt: Characters with the skill may operate in zero-G conditions with little Or no penalty. Characters without the skill, however, must add Modifier to the target number of any Action Check they make zero gravity environments Characters without the Zero G Operations Skill must aiso roll 206 whenever they first enter zero gravity environment: If the result less than 6, tne character suffers space sick: ness and +1 penalty applies to all Skill Checks while in any zero-gravity environment from this point forward. Zero gravity conditions affect the movement of all charac ters.
